prd_refs: PRD §11.3 provider auth failure stops workflow (line 2660)
description: Auth checks for Outlook / Graph / GitHub providers must surface as structured observations, never auto-trigger interactive auth. The agent loop pauses and instructs the user to authenticate manually (per §7.12).
notes: Document that automated auth (silent token grants) is out of scope for SlashOps; it remains a user concern.
steps: TDD: Workflow stops on auth-required observation.
TDD: Auth success produces no observation noise.
TDD: Function never invokes interactive `Connect-*` cmdlets.
Author `Test-OutlookAuth.ps1` invoking the provider's "whoami" / `gh auth status` equivalent.
name: [biz-10] Provider auth checks as observations
